introSection:
Wolverine Wildcat is a wooden roller coaster located at Michigan's Adventure in Muskegon, Michigan, USA. The attraction opened in 1988.

The ride has a double out and back layout that is loosely based on Phoenix at Knoebels.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride first opened on May 14, 1988.

Wolverine Wildcat celebrated its 20th year at Michigan's Adventure in 2008, which was also Shivering Timbers' 10th anniversary and Thunderhawk's opening year.

Approximately 200 feet of Titan Track was installed on the ride in 2022 by Great Coasters International and Skyline Attractions. An additional of Titan Track was installed for the 2025 season.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 4 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 24 riders per train.

fullText:
Wolverine Wildcat is a wooden roller coaster located at Michigan's Adventure in Muskegon, Michigan, USA. The attraction opened in 1988.

The ride has a double out and back layout that is loosely based on Phoenix at Knoebels.

The ride first opened on May 14, 1988.

Wolverine Wildcat celebrated its 20th year at Michigan's Adventure in 2008, which was also Shivering Timbers' 10th anniversary and Thunderhawk's opening year.

Approximately 200 feet of Titan Track was installed on the ride in 2022 by Great Coasters International and Skyline Attractions. An additional of Titan Track was installed for the 2025 season.



4 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 24 riders per train.
